title: Defining Quality, Safety and Risk from an Anaesthesiology perspective – Protocol for a Scoping Review
author: Walsh, Sarah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the Entended Data document which includes the PRISMA-ScR Checklist, Search Strategy, Eligibility criteria as per the SPIDER framework, and Data extraction table for a protocol paper of a scoping literature review titled: 'Defining Quality, Safety and Risk from an Anaesthesiology perspective- Protocol for a Scoping Review.'
